title: Tool
description: A skill definition for an AI agent including name, description, and input parameter schema.

type.description: The type of tool (custom or provider built-in).

name.description: Unique name of the tool used to identify the invocation.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the tool does, used by the model to decide when to call it.
description.example: Get the current weather for a given location.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema defining the parameters the tool accepts.

properties.description: Map of parameter names to their schema definitions.

strict.description: When true, enforces strict JSON Schema compliance for tool call inputs.
